Claims Center

Help clients take the right next step quickly after an accident, loss, or incident.

The current site includes a claims support area with carrier information. This redesign preserves that function, then improves the emergency guidance, carrier lookup, and mobile usability.

Immediate action

Protect people first, contact emergency services when needed, document the scene if safe, and then begin the claim with your carrier. Our office can help you understand what comes next.

What to do after an incident

  • Move to a safe location if possible and check for injuries.
  • Call emergency services when appropriate.
  • Gather names, phone numbers, policy details, and photos if safe.
  • Contact your carrier directly using the directory, then contact our office.

Need office support?

Call (203) 949-1712 for guidance if you are unsure how to start, what information matters, or how to follow up after the carrier opens the claim.

Auto and personal lines

Progressive

Online claim and billing tools are available directly through the carrier.

MAPFRE

Please contact the office for guided claims and payment support.

Safeco

Prefer to talk with the office first?

We are still part of the support path even when the carrier formally handles the claim.
